title: Becoming her Everyday oversized  t-shirt - Heather Grey / S
description: Effortless Style, Conscious Choice This isn't your basic tee. It's the elevated essential that transforms any outfit from forgettable to effortlessly cool. The oversized fit with dropped shoulders creates that coveted relaxed silhouette—the kind that looks intentional, not sloppy. The high neck adds an unexpected detail that sets it apart from everything else in your rotation. Pair it with anything: jeans, joggers, skirts, layers. It just works. The Fabric Story: Made from 100% organic combed ring-spun cotton certified under GOTS (Global Organic Textile Standard) and OCS (Organic Content Standard). Translation? This tee is grown, processed, and manufactured without harmful chemicals—better for you, better for the planet. Design Details: Oversized, relaxed fit for that modern streetwear aesthetic High neck with 1×1 rib collar for subtle sophistication Dropped shoulders for that perfectly slouchy look Set-in sleeves for clean construction Heavier 5.9 oz fabric (200 g/m²) that drapes beautifully Self-fabric neck tape for durability and comfort Responsibly Made: Ethically sourced from Bangladesh with certified organic practices. Sizing Note: This style runs deliberately oversized with a bigger European fit. For a true oversized look, order your usual size. For a more fitted (but still relaxed) fit, size down. Why You'll Reach for It: Because it's the piece that makes getting dressed easy. Throw it on and instantly look put-together. Layer it or wear it solo. Dress it up or down. It's the kind of versatile you actually use. Sustainable. Stylish. Unmistakably you.

title: Intentional Living Unisex t-shirt - Light Blue / S
description: Wear Your Values Some clothes are just... there. This one means something. The Intentional Living tee is for people who choose quality, comfort, and consciousness not just what's easy. Made from 100% combed and ring-spun cotton, this isn't fast fashion. It's the kind of piece you buy once and wear for years. Soft from day one. Built to last beyond trends. Designed for Real Life: Unisex fit that flatters every body Lightweight 4.2 oz fabric that breathes with you Pre-shrunk so it stays true to size Side-seamed construction and shoulder-to-shoulder taping for durability Just enough stretch for all-day ease Made Thoughtfully: Ethically sourced from Nicaragua, Mexico, Honduras, or the US—because where your clothes come from matters. A Gentle Note: This premium cotton has a beautifully soft hand, which means lighter colors may be slightly sheer in bright light. We recommend a simple underlayer for pale shades, or embrace the relaxed aesthetic. This is more than a t-shirt. It's a daily reminder to live with intention—to choose better, feel better, do better. Available in multiple colors. Choose yours and commit to the comfort.
